name: nexar-finanzas
description: Scripts auxiliares para levantar Nexar Finanzas en modo web/remoto para revisión de templates.

scripts.dev:web: cross-env SECRET_KEY=nexar-dev-local-key FINANZAS_DATA_DIR=.nexar-data python -c "from app import app; app.run(debug=False, host='127.0.0.1', port=5000, threaded=True, use_reloader=False)"
scripts.dev:remote: cross-env SECRET_KEY=nexar-dev-local-key FINANZAS_DATA_DIR=.nexar-data python -c "from app import app; app.run(debug=False, host='0.0.0.0', port=5000, threaded=True, use_reloader=False)"
